name: Бизнес-мониторинг
description: Управленческий и продуктовый мониторинг сервиса EGISZ: проникновение, успешность по типам документов и динамика по ЮЛ.

cards.name: Проникновение сервиса
cards.description: Доля активных клиник за 30 дней от общего количества зарегистрированных JID.

native.query: WITH total AS (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT dc.jid)::bigint AS total_registered FROM public.dim_clinics dc WHERE dc.jid IS NOT NULL AND dc.mo_uid <> 'ghost-log-group-9901'), active AS (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ua.jid)::bigint AS active_30d FROM public.v_unified_analytics ua WHERE ua.jid IS NOT NULL AND ua.transaction_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days') SELECT total.total_registered AS "Всего зарегистрированных клиник", active.active_30d AS "Активные клиники (30д)", COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * active.active_30d / NULLIF(total.total_registered, 0), 2), 0) AS "Проникновение сервиса, %" FROM total CROSS JOIN active;

cards.name: Успешность по типам документов
cards.description: Распределение Success/Error по кодам KIND за 30 дней.

native.query: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(ua.document_kind), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(ua.service_kind), ''), 'N/A') AS "KIND", COUNT(*)::bigint AS "Total", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ua.is_success)::bigint AS "Success", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ua.is_error)::bigint AS "Errors", COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ua.is_success) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2), 0) AS "Success, %", COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ua.is_error) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2), 0) AS "Errors, %" FROM public.v_unified_analytics ua WHERE ua.transaction_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' [[ AND ua.clinic_jid = {{clinic_jid}} ]] [[ AND ua.mo_uid = {{organization_oid}} ]] GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY "Total" DESC;

cards.name: Динамика по ЮЛ
cards.description: Топ активных клиник по объему транзакций за последние 30 дней.

native.query: SELECT ua.clinic_label AS "Clinic", COUNT(*)::bigint AS "Transactions", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ua.is_success)::bigint AS "Success", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ua.is_error)::bigint AS "Errors" FROM public.v_unified_analytics ua WHERE ua.clinic_jid IS NOT NULL AND ua.transaction_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' [[ AND ua.clinic_jid = {{clinic_jid}} ]] [[ AND ua.mo_uid = {{organization_oid}} ]] GROUP BY ua.clinic_label ORDER BY "Transactions" DESC, ua.clinic_label ASC LIMIT 30;
